figures.caption: Figure 4: Concept specific attribution map reveals differential usage of concepts across prediction heads in BPNet. a) Top 10 motif concepts identified in the last shared convolutional layer by all prediction heads. b) CAV cosine similarity heatmap of top 30 motif concepts (F-score > 0.9) in BPNet. c) Log TPCAV scores of top 30 motif concepts (F-score > 0.9) across all prediction tasks, bar color indicates whether a concept is positive (red) or negative (blue) influence.
